source_material.title: Professional mobility workflow study
source_material.body: Research context: pre-fieldwork survey dry run for a workflow adoption study. Target population: adults responsible for fleet workflow decisions in the United States. Source sample size for the intended human study is 800. Estimated target population size is 12000. Segment variables: region and role. Expected analyses: adoption topline, region cut, role cut, barrier themes. The synthetic panel should remain small and be clearly separated from the target population scale.

expected_research_intake.research_context: Pre-fieldwork professional survey dry run for workflow adoption.
expected_research_intake.target_population_summary: Adults responsible for fleet workflow decisions in the United States.
unresolved_gaps: Weighting plan is not yet specified.

objectives: Validate the survey plan before fieldwork.
decision_questions: Should the survey proceed to fieldwork?
Which segment objections require mitigation first?
assumptions: The synthetic panel must not be confused with the target population.
chart_plan: Render closed-ended toplines and segment cuts.
Replace open-text series with evidence panels.

expected_question_rationales.rationale: Measures adoption intent for the core fieldwork decision.
Identifies the main structured barrier behind hesitation.
Captures the detailed reason behind the structured barrier choice.

expected_report_warnings: Do not treat 12 synthetic respondents as representative of the 12,000-person target population.
expected_human_fieldwork_handoff: Use the dry run to check question logic and chart planning before fieldwork.
Proceed to human fieldwork only after the segmentation and sample plan are finalized.
